mapper.sql: ID AS id, ORDER_NO AS orderNo, SOCIAL_ACCOUNT_ID AS socialAccountId, ORDER_STATUS AS orderStatus, PRODUCT_AMOUNT AS productAmount, DISCOUNT_AMOUNT AS discountAmount, USED_POINT AS usedPoint, PAYMENT_AMOUNT AS paymentAmount, EARNED_POINT AS earnedPoint, RECEIVER_NAME AS receiverName, RECEIVER_PHONE AS receiverPhone, ZIP_CODE AS zipCode, ADDRESS AS address, ADDRESS_DETAIL AS addressDetail, MEMO AS memo, CRE_TM AS creTm, UPT_TM AS uptTm

ID AS id, ORDER_ID AS orderId, CART_ID AS cartId, PRODUCT_ID AS productId, PRODUCT_DET_ID AS productDetId, PRODUCT_NAME AS productName, PRODUCT_IMAGE AS productImage, OPTION_NAME AS optionName, QUANTITY AS quantity, UNIT_PRICE AS unitPrice, DISCOUNT_AMOUNT AS discountAmount, PAYMENT_AMOUNT AS paymentAmount, CRE_TM AS creTm, UPT_TM AS uptTm

ID AS id, ORDER_ID AS orderId, ORDER_NO AS orderNo, SOCIAL_ACCOUNT_ID AS socialAccountId, RECEIVER_NAME AS receiverName, RECEIVER_PHONE AS receiverPhone, ZIP_CODE AS zipCode, ADDRESS AS address, ADDRESS_DETAIL AS addressDetail, MEMO AS memo, DELIVERY_STATUS AS deliveryStatus, DELIVERY_COMPANY AS deliveryCompany, INVOICE_NO AS invoiceNo, SHIPPED_TM AS shippedTm, DELIVERED_TM AS deliveredTm, DEL_YN AS delYn, CRE_TM AS creTm, UPT_TM AS uptTm
mapper.insert: /* Order.insertOrder */ INSERT INTO TB_ORDER ( ORDER_NO, SOCIAL_ACCOUNT_ID, ORDER_STATUS, PRODUCT_AMOUNT, DISCOUNT_AMOUNT, USED_POINT, PAYMENT_AMOUNT, EARNED_POINT, RECEIVER_NAME, RECEIVER_PHONE, ZIP_CODE, ADDRESS, ADDRESS_DETAIL, MEMO, CRE_TM, UPT_TM ) VALUES ( #{orderNo}, #{socialAccountId}, COALESCE(#{orderStatus}, 'R'), COALESCE(#{productAmount}, 0), COALESCE(#{discountAmount}, 0), COALESCE(#{usedPoint}, 0), COALESCE(#{paymentAmount}, 0), COALESCE(#{earnedPoint}, 0), #{receiverName}, #{receiverPhone}, #{zipCode}, #{address}, #{addressDetail}, #{memo}, NOW(), NOW() )

/* Order.insertOrderDelivery */ INSERT INTO TB_ORDER_DELIVERY ( ORDER_ID, ORDER_NO, SOCIAL_ACCOUNT_ID, RECEIVER_NAME, RECEIVER_PHONE, ZIP_CODE, ADDRESS, ADDRESS_DETAIL, MEMO, DELIVERY_STATUS, DEL_YN, CRE_TM, UPT_TM ) VALUES ( #{orderId}, #{orderNo}, #{socialAccountId}, #{receiverName}, #{receiverPhone}, #{zipCode}, #{address}, #{addressDetail}, #{memo}, COALESCE(#{deliveryStatus}, 'READY'), COALESCE(#{delYn}, 'N'), NOW(), NOW() )

/* Order.insertOrderItem */ INSERT INTO TB_ORDER_ITEM ( ORDER_ID, CART_ID, PRODUCT_ID, PRODUCT_DET_ID, PRODUCT_NAME, PRODUCT_IMAGE, OPTION_NAME, QUANTITY, UNIT_PRICE, DISCOUNT_AMOUNT, PAYMENT_AMOUNT, CRE_TM, UPT_TM ) VALUES ( #{orderId}, #{cartId}, #{productId}, #{productDetId}, #{productName}, #{productImage}, #{optionName}, COALESCE(#{quantity}, 1), COALESCE(#{unitPrice}, 0), COALESCE(#{discountAmount}, 0), COALESCE(#{paymentAmount}, 0), NOW(), NOW() )
mapper.select:
/* Order.selectOrderDelivery */ SELECT
FROM TB_ORDER_DELIVERY WHERE ORDER_ID = #{orderId} AND DEL_YN = 'N' ORDER BY ID DESC LIMIT 1

/* Order.selectOrderByOrderItemId */ SELECT O.ID AS id, O.ORDER_NO AS orderNo, O.SOCIAL_ACCOUNT_ID AS socialAccountId, O.ORDER_STATUS AS orderStatus, O.PRODUCT_AMOUNT AS productAmount, O.DISCOUNT_AMOUNT AS discountAmount, O.USED_POINT AS usedPoint, O.PAYMENT_AMOUNT AS paymentAmount, O.EARNED_POINT AS earnedPoint, O.RECEIVER_NAME AS receiverName, O.RECEIVER_PHONE AS receiverPhone, O.ZIP_CODE AS zipCode, O.ADDRESS AS address, O.ADDRESS_DETAIL AS addressDetail, O.MEMO AS memo, O.CRE_TM AS creTm, O.UPT_TM AS uptTm FROM TB_ORDER O JOIN TB_ORDER_ITEM OI ON OI.ORDER_ID = O.ID WHERE OI.ID = #{orderItemId} LIMIT 1

/* Order.selectOrderListForBo */ SELECT O.ID AS orderId, O.ORDER_NO AS orderNo, O.ORDER_STATUS AS orderStatus, O.PRODUCT_AMOUNT AS productAmount, O.USED_POINT AS usedPoint, O.PAYMENT_AMOUNT AS paymentAmount, O.CRE_TM AS creTm, P.ID AS paymentSeq, P.PAYMENT_STATUS AS paymentStatus, COUNT(OI.ID) AS itemCount, (SELECT PRODUCT_NAME FROM TB_ORDER_ITEM WHERE ORDER_ID = O.ID ORDER BY ID ASC LIMIT 1) AS topProductName FROM TB_ORDER O LEFT JOIN TB_PAYMENT P ON P.ORDER_ID = O.ID AND P.DEL_YN = 'N' LEFT JOIN TB_ORDER_ITEM OI ON OI.ORDER_ID = O.ID WHERE O.CRE_TM >= #{fromDateTime} AND O.CRE_TM < #{toDateTime} GROUP BY O.ID, O.ORDER_NO, O.ORDER_STATUS, O.PRODUCT_AMOUNT, O.USED_POINT, O.PAYMENT_AMOUNT, O.CRE_TM, P.ID, P.PAYMENT_STATUS ORDER BY O.ID DESC
